mission.title: kubevela: last-applied-configuration contains generated fields when shared-resource policy is used
mission.description: last-applied-configuration contains generated fields when shared-resource policy is used. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current kubevela deployment
steps.description:
Verify your kubevela version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevela
helm list -n kubevela 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working kubevela installation.

steps.title: Review kubevela configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kubevela configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevela
kubectl get configmap -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevela
```
When applying a shared resource from the second application, `last-applied-configuration` ends up containing all of the contents of a live manifest, rather than the manifest that was applied, thus breaking all of the subsequent applies

**To

steps.title: Apply the fix for last-applied-configuration contains generated fields when…

```yaml
apiVersion: core.oam.dev/v1beta1
kind: Application
metadata:
  name: app-1
spec:
  components:
    - name: my-component
      type: k8s-objects
      properties:
        objects:
          - apiVersion: v1
            kind: Pod
            metadata:
              name: static-web
            spec:
              containers:
                - name: web
                  image: nginx
                  ports:
                    - name: web
                      containerPort: 80
                      protocol: TCP
  policies:
    - name: shared-pod
      type: shared-resource
      properties:
  
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevela
kubectl get events -n kubevela --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "last-applied-configuration contains generated fields when…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
### Description of your changes

copilot:all

Fixes #

I have:

### How has this code been tested

### Special notes for your reviewer
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: core.oam.dev/v1beta1
kind: Application
metadata:
  name: app-1
spec:
  components:
    - name: my-component
      type: k8s-objects
      properties:
        objects:
          - apiVersion: v1
            kind: Pod
            metadata:
              name: static-web
            spec:
              containers:
                - name: web
                  image: nginx
                  ports:
                    - name: web
                      containerPort: 80
                      protocol: TCP
  policies:
    - name: shared-pod
      type: shared-resource
      properties:
        rules:
          - selector:
              resourceTypes: ["Pod"]

apiVersion: core.oam.dev/v1beta1
kind: Application
metadata:
  name: app-2
spec:
  components:
    - name: my-component
      type: k8s-objects
      properties:
        objects:
          - apiVersion: v1
            kind: Pod
            metadata:
              name: static-web
            spec:
              containers:
                - name: web
                  image: nginx
                  ports:
                    - name: web
                      containerPort: 80
                      protocol: TCP
  policies:
    - name: shared-pod
      type: shared-resource
      properties:
        rules:
          - selector:
              resourceTypes: ["Pod"]

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kubevela installed or the issue environment reproducible.
